mnemonic_ru: No oxygen → -IDE. Has oxygen: max OS → -ATE, lower → -ITE. Even higher → PER-...-ATE, even lower → HYPO-...-ITE.

suffix_rules.description_ru: Binary anions (no oxygen) use the -ide suffix
Oxoanion with the maximum oxidation state of the central atom → -ate
Oxoanion with a lower oxidation state → -ite
Oxidation state above the typical maximum → per-...-ate
Oxidation state below the typical minimum for oxy-anions → hypo-...-ite
